# Support

## 💡 Asking Questions
If you have a question about using the dataset, accessing the data, or integrating it into your application, please [open a Discussion](https://github.com/Kloverdevs/university-college-domains/discussions).

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Incorrect Data
If you've found a bug, a broken domain, or an incorrect institution mapped, please [open an Issue](https://github.com/Kloverdevs/university-college-domains/issues/new/choose).

## ➕ Adding Data
If you'd like to add a missing university or college, please follow our contributing guidelines in the README and submit a Pull Request. You can also use our **Data Addition Issue Template**.

## 🔒 Security Vulnerabilities
Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues. Reach out to the maintainers directly.
